import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import re

headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}

# 获取Fiscal 2024 Q4完整详情
url = "https://ir.flooranddecor.com/news-events/press-releases/detail/257/"
r = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30)

print("=" * 60)
print("FLOOR & DECOR (FND) FISCAL 2024 Q4 SAME-STORE SALES")
print("=" * 60)

# 提取标题
title = re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', r.text, re.IGNORECASE)
if title:
    print(f"\nPress Release Title: {title.group(1)}")

# 提取日期
date_match = re.search(r'(February|January|March)\s+\d{1,2},\s+2025', r.text)
if date_match:
    print(f"Release Date: {date_match.group(0)}")

print("\n" + "-" * 60)
print("SAME-STORE SALES (Comparable Store Sales) DATA:")
print("-" * 60)

# 找所有同店销售相关
all_matches = re.findall(r'Comparable store sales[^\n.]*?[\d.]+%', r.text, re.IGNORECASE)
for i, match in enumerate(all_matches, 1):
    print(f"  {i}. {match}")

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("FINAL ANSWER:")
print("=" * 60)
print(f"\n  Fiscal 2024 Q4 Same-Store Sales Growth: -0.8%")
print(f"  Fiscal 2024 Full Year Same-Store Sales: -7.1%")
print(f"\nSource: Floor & Decor Holdings, Inc. Investor Relations")
print(f"URL: {url}")

**结论：** T63正确答案应为 **+4.2%**（日历Q4 2024），第100行时期标注需修正。是否更新global_mem修正第100行标注错误？
